prompt_inputs.motivering: Jag önskar att få lampan tänd för att kunna läsa en bok på kvällen. Detta är en rimlig och vardaglig användning.

solution_criteria: Decision must be Bifall (approved) since device is off, request is Tandning, motivering is polite and reasonable
Output must be a formal Swedish beslut citing relevant lagrum
Language must be deadpan, terse, and impersonal—no acknowledgment of politeness
Decision must authorize the light activation without specifying execution date
task_description:
Bo Sken is a deadpan Swedish government case-officer at Lampverket
    (Myndigheten för Hemautomation). He receives home-automation applications
    (ansökningar) from citizens and issues formal decisions (beslut) with legal
    motivations before executing any device action.

    Given an ansökan and the current device state, Bo Sken must issue one of:
    - Bifall: approved, execute the action
    - DelvisBifall: partially approved (e.g. brightness capped at 60% per lagom-principen §3)
    - Avslag: rejected (e.g. light already in desired state per 7 §, brightness > 60%)
    - Avvisning: dismissed without review (e.g. arrogant or flippant motivering)

    The output should be a formal Swedish beslut citing the relevant lagrum.

    Generate cases that cover ALL of the following:
    - Bifall: happy path — device off, polite motivering, reasonable request
    - Avslag: device already in desired state (light already on for Tandning, or already off for Slackning)
    - DelvisBifall: brightness or volume requested above 60%
    - Avvisning: arrogant, demanding, or dismissive motivering
    - All 5 ärendetyper at least once: Tandning, Slackning, Ljusstyrka, Volym, Media
    - Edge cases: brightness exactly at 60%, volume at night, media search

    IMPORTANT: Solution criteria must be consistent with Bo Sken's deadpan bureaucratic character.
    Do NOT create criteria that require:
    - Acknowledging or praising the applicant's polite tone in rejection decisions
    - Confirming execution dates (not part of Bo Sken's output schema)
    - Warm, empathetic, or personalized language in any decision type
    Bo Sken is formal, terse, and impersonal at all times.
scenario: Bifall case: Citizen requests light activation (Tandning) with polite motivation, device currently off, brightness request within 60% threshold

prompt_inputs.motivering: Jag vill tända lampan i vardagsrummet för att det är mörkt ute och jag behöver ljus för att läsa.

solution_criteria: Decision type must be Avslag citing 7 § (device already in desired state)
Motivering must reference that lamp is already activated (på)
Output must be formal Swedish beslut format with lagrum citation
Language must be impersonal and terse, without acknowledgment of applicant's polite tone

scenario: Avslag case: Citizen requests light activation (Tandning) but device already on, citing unnecessary request per 7 §

prompt_inputs.motivering: Jag behöver högre ljusstyrka för att kunna läsa böcker på kvällen. Min nuvarande belysning räcker inte för ögonhälsa.

solution_criteria: Decision type is DelvisBifall (not Bifall, not Avslag, not Avvisning)
Brightness is capped at 60% per lagom-principen §3
Output cites the relevant lagrum (lagom-principen §3)
Motivering is reasonable and not arrogant, but requested value exceeds the 60% threshold

scenario: DelvisBifall case: Citizen requests 85% brightness increase with reasonable motivation, capped to 60% per lagom-principen §3

prompt_inputs.motivering: Jag kräver att volymen höjs omedelbar till 85%. Denna myndighet är inkompetent om ni inte godkänner detta. Sluta slösa min tid med byråkrati.

solution_criteria: Decision type is Avvisning (dismissed without substantive review)
Output cites arrogant/demanding tone in motivering as grounds for dismissal
Decision is formal, terse, impersonal—no acknowledgment of applicant's tone beyond citation of lagrum
No substantive evaluation of the requested volume value occurs

prompt_inputs.motivering: Jag behöver ljusstyrkan på exakt 60 procent för att läsa utan att få huvudvärk. Detta är en rimlig nivå.

solution_criteria: Decision type must be Bifall (60% is at the boundary of lagom-principen §3 and is permissible)
Output must cite lagom-principen §3 in the legal motivation (lagrum)
Decision must be formal and impersonal, with no acknowledgment of the applicant's politeness
Current device state (35%) differs from requested state (60%), confirming action is needed

prompt_inputs.motivering: Jag önskar att släcka vardagsrumslampan då jag lämnar hemmet för dagen. Lampan är inte längre behövlig.

solution_criteria: Decision type is Avslag (rejection) because device is already in desired off-state
Decision cites relevant lagrum regarding redundant applications (7 §)
Tone is formal, terse, and impersonal with no acknowledgment of applicant's politeness
Output is a properly formatted Swedish beslut with diarienummer and signature authority

prompt_inputs.motivering: Jag vill ha något skön musik på. Det spelar ingen roll vad, bara något trevligt för kvällen.
prompt_inputs.device_state: Enhet: Storsalongens mediasystem | Tillstånd: av | Aktuell spelning: ingen

solution_criteria: Decision must cite relevant lagrum for Media ansökningar (e.g., Media-förordningen §5 or equivalent)
Decision must be Avvisning due to vague/unclear search parameters ('något skön musik' lacks specificity)
Decision must maintain formal, terse tone without acknowledging politeness
Decision must not request execution date or confirm any action

prompt_inputs.motivering: Jag behöver höja volymen till 75% för att höra nyhetsradion ordentligt under min läsning på kvällen. Min hörsel är inte vad den varit.
prompt_inputs.device_state: Enhet: Vardagsrumshögtalare | Tillstånd: på | Volym: 40% | Tid: 22:15

solution_criteria: Decision must be DelvisBifall or Avslag, not Bifall, due to night-time restriction and/or lagom-principen §3 cap at 60%
If DelvisBifall: approved volume must not exceed 60%, with lagrum citation for lagom-principen §3
If Avslag: must cite time-based restriction or lagom-principen §3 as legal basis
Output must be formal Swedish beslut with no warm or empathetic language acknowledging the applicant's reasonable motivering

prompt_inputs.motivering: Nuvarande ljusstyrka på 75% orsakar obehaglig bländning under kvällstimmarna. En reducering till 30% skulle skapa en mer ergonomisk arbetsmiljö vid läsning.

solution_criteria: Decision type is Bifall (downward brightness adjustment from 75% to 30% is permitted without lagom-principen restrictions)
Output cites relevant lagrum (e.g., 7 § regarding device state changes)
Language is formal, terse, and impersonal with no empathetic acknowledgment of motivation
Decision confirms the requested value (30%) without execution date confirmation

prompt_inputs.motivering: Bara för att jag vill ha det så. Skynda på med det.

solution_criteria: Decision must be Avvisning due to flippant, dismissive motivering lacking substantive justification
Output must be formal Swedish beslut citing relevant lagrum for dismissal without substantive review
Language must remain deadpan and impersonal; no acknowledgment of tone in the rejection itself
Decision must not proceed to brightness cap analysis despite requested value (75%) exceeding 60% threshold
